item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
item.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday attended the dignified transfer of the remains of four service members killed in Iranian attacks this month after hostilities ramped up following the collapse of the ceasefire.

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth salute as members of a U.S. Army carry team move the flag-draped transfer case holding the remains of Army Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad of Ozone Park, N.Y,, during a dignified transfer at Dover Air Force Base on July 22, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of four army member portraits in camouflage uniform, from left, Isabella Gonzales, Tyler James Feehan, Angel Rampersad, and Michael Emmanuel Swinton
media:content.media:description: From left, Pvt. Isabella Gonzales; 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan; Sgt. Angel Rampersad; Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton.

media:content.media:text: Flag-draped transfer cases are loaded into vehicles during a dignified transfer
media:content.media:description: Flag-draped transfer cases are loaded into vehicles Wednesday at Dover Air Force Base.

item.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of 4 service members killed in Iran attacks since the ceasefire ended

item.description: The United States launched yet another round of airstrikes against the Iranian regime Tuesday, just hours after the Pentagon asked Congress for an additional $67 billion to support the ongoing conflict. “We’re not finished at all,” President Donald Trump said of the war. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Pete Hegseth Estimates US War With Iran Has Cost $37.5B So Far
media:content.media:description: The United States launched yet another round of airstrikes against the Iranian regime Tuesday, just hours after the Pentagon asked Congress for an additional $67 billion to support the ongoing conflict. “We’re not finished at all,” President Donald Trump said of the war. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

item.title: Pete Hegseth Estimates US War With Iran Has Cost $37.5B So Far

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: The United States is about to enter its fifth month of war with Iran, and NBC News’ chief foreign correspondent Richard Engel has been covering all the developments.

media:content.media:text: Richard Engel on NBC's "TODAY" Show on July 20, 2022.
media:content.media:description: Richard Engel on NBC's "TODAY" show in 2022.

item.title: Send your questions for Richard Engel on the war with Iran and more

item.dc:creator: Garrett Haake
Chantal Da Silva
item.description: President Donald Trump has approved a landmark civilian nuclear deal between the United States and Saudi Arabia that is expected to be announced Wednesday, a senior administration official told NBC News.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Meets With The Crown Prince And Prime Minister Of Saudi Arabia At The White House
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump (L) speaks with Crown Prince and Prime Minister Mohammed bin Salman of Saudi Arabia as he arrives to the White House on November 18, 2025 in Washington, DC.

item.title: Trump approves landmark U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The price of oil surged nearly 5% Wednesday as U.S. officials talked down new peace talks. Major disruptions now face two of the world’s key supply routes.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-UAE-IRAN-US-ISRAEL-WAR
media:content.media:description: Ships are docked along a pier at the Khor Fakkan Container Terminal, the only natural deep-sea port in the region and one of the major container ports in Sharjah Emirate, along the Gulf of Oman on July 14, 2026.

item.title: Oil surges past $95 as U.S. downplays Iran diplomacy and 2nd key trade route is disrupted

item.description: Watch live coverage as President Donald Trump speaks at Wheeler High School in Marietta, Georgia.

media:content.media:title: Trump speaks at Atlanta area high school
media:content.media:description: Watch live coverage as President Donald Trump speaks at Wheeler High School in Marietta, Georgia.

item.title: Trump speaks at Atlanta area high school

item.dc:creator: Adam Edelman
item.description: NBC News projects that Biggs defeated fellow Rep. David Schweikert to move on to the general election against Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.

media:content.media:text: Election 2026 Arizona Governor
media:content.media:description: Rep. Andy Biggs, R-Ariz., a former chair of the conservative House Freedom Caucus, was endorsed by President Donald Trump.

media:content.media:text: Gov. Katie Hobbs
media:content.media:description: Rep. Andy Biggs, R-Ariz., a former chair of the conservative House Freedom Caucus, was endorsed by President Donald Trump.

item.title: Trump-backed Rep. Andy Biggs wins GOP primary for Arizona governor

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
item.description: Democrat Amish Shah, a physician and former state lawmaker, has opened a lead in the primary for a key Arizona battleground district despite party leaders backing another candidate.

media:content.media:text: Former state Rep. Amish Shah, an emergency room doctor by trade, participates in the 2026 AZ Clean Elections primary debate for
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

media:content.media:text: Jay Feely, former NFL kicker and Republican Congressional candidate for Arizona, outside a polling location at Fountain Hills Community Center during a primary election in Fountain Hills, Arizona.
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

media:content.media:text: Rep. Juan Ciscomani walking outdoors.
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

item.title: Democratic leaders’ pick trails in Arizona primary for a key battleground district

item.dc:creator: Lauren Zola
item.description: Kolodin will face Democratic incumbent Adrian Fontes after defeating former state Republican Party chair Gina Swoboda, NBC News projects.

media:content.media:text: Alex Kolodin speaks while seated at a roundtable
media:content.media:description: Republican state Rep. Alexander Kolodin prepares to debate former Arizona Republican Party Chair Gina Swoboda in Phoenix on May 14.

item.title: Alexander Kolodin, who tried to overturn Arizona election results, wins GOP nod for secretary of state

item.description: Preliminary findings from Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy showed that his cause of death was “undetermined” pending further investigation. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist reports on how soon information from the autopsy of the Jackson County Coroner's office could be accessed.

media:content.media:title: Attorney Ben Crump presents Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy results
media:content.media:description: Preliminary findings from Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy showed that his cause of death was “undetermined” pending further investigation. NBC News’ Aaron Gilchrist reports on how soon information from the autopsy of the Jackson County Coroner's office could be accessed.

item.title: Attorney Ben Crump presents Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy results

item.description: Ukrainian long-range drones targeted large warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s equivalent of Amazon, which sells military equipment like body armor and drone parts, but mainly serves as a place for regular Russians to sell their goods. President Zelenskyy said the warehouses are “involved in supplying the Russian army,” adding that Ukraine is “brining the war home – to Russia.”

media:content.media:title: Ukraine targets Russian online retailer Wildberries
media:content.media:description: Ukrainian long-range drones targeted large warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia’s equivalent of Amazon, which sells military equipment like body armor and drone parts, but mainly serves as a place for regular Russians to sell their goods. President Zelenskyy said the warehouses are “involved in supplying the Russian army,” adding that Ukraine is “brining the war home – to Russia.”

item.title: Ukraine targets Russian online retailer Wildberries

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

media:content.media:text: Woman in a blue patient uniform gown sits alone on a bed in a private room and looking out the window in hospital, expressing her concern about the results of an examination. Sad patient and thinking stress anxiety with symptoms of depression and sadness,

item.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you

item.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
item.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday attended the dignified transfer of the remains of four service members killed in Iranian attacks this month after hostilities ramped up following the collapse of the ceasefire.

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth salute as members of a U.S. Army carry team move the flag-draped transfer case holding the remains of Army Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad of Ozone Park, N.Y,, during a dignified transfer at Dover Air Force Base on July 22, 2026.

media:content.media:text: A split composite image of four army member portraits in camouflage uniform, from left, Isabella Gonzales, Tyler James Feehan, Angel Rampersad, and Michael Emmanuel Swinton
media:content.media:description: From left, Pvt. Isabella Gonzales; 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan; Sgt. Angel Rampersad; Sgt. Michael Emmanuel Swinton.

media:content.media:text: Flag-draped transfer cases are loaded into vehicles during a dignified transfer
media:content.media:description: Flag-draped transfer cases are loaded into vehicles Wednesday at Dover Air Force Base.

item.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of 4 service members killed in Iran attacks since the ceasefire ended

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
item.description: The Trump administration is facing a spike in departures of powerful Cabinet department officials compared to his first term, according to the nonprofit Partnership for Public Service.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Meets With His Cabinet At The White House
media:content.media:description: New analysis from the Partnership for Public Service found that 27 Senate-confirmed officials have left their positions since the start of President Donald Trump's second term.

item.title: Departures of Senate-confirmed Trump officials are surpassing his first term, new report finds

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: The United States is about to enter its fifth month of war with Iran, and NBC News’ chief foreign correspondent Richard Engel has been covering all the developments.

media:content.media:text: Richard Engel on NBC's "TODAY" Show on July 20, 2022.
media:content.media:description: Richard Engel on NBC's "TODAY" show in 2022.

item.title: Send your questions for Richard Engel on the war with Iran and more

item.dc:creator: Rebecca Cohen
item.description: An independent autopsy report commissioned by the legal team representing Nolan Wells’ family found that the teenager’s cause and manner of death were “undetermined,” pending investigation.

media:content.media:text: Press conference in Manhattan regarding the death of Nolan Xavier Wells
media:content.media:description: A person holds a placard that reads "Justice for Nolan" outside of the National Action Network headquarters in New York on July 10, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Nolan Wells with his parents.
media:content.media:description: Nolan Wells with his parents.

item.title: Nolan Wells’ independent autopsy results in ‘undetermined’ cause and manner of death

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
item.description: Democrat Amish Shah, a physician and former state lawmaker, has opened a lead in the primary for a key Arizona battleground district despite party leaders backing another candidate.

media:content.media:text: Former state Rep. Amish Shah, an emergency room doctor by trade, participates in the 2026 AZ Clean Elections primary debate for
media:content.media:description: Former state Rep. Amish Shah participates in a primary debate for the 1st Congressional District in Scottsdale, Ariz., on June 23.

item.dc:creator: Garrett Haake
Chantal Da Silva
item.description: President Donald Trump has approved a landmark civilian nuclear deal between the United States and Saudi Arabia that is expected to be announced Wednesday, a senior administration official told NBC News.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Meets With The Crown Prince And Prime Minister Of Saudi Arabia At The White House
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump (L) speaks with Crown Prince and Prime Minister Mohammed bin Salman of Saudi Arabia as he arrives to the White House on November 18, 2025 in Washington, DC.

item.title: Trump approves landmark U.S.-Saudi nuclear deal

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: I talked to laundry experts to learn how often you should change and wash your bedding and when it’s time to throw them out for a new set.

media:content.media:text: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.
media:content.media:description: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.

media:content.media:text: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.
media:content.media:description: Even if you wash your sheets regularly and they look like they've seen better days, it may be time to replace them.

item.title: How often should you wash and change out your sheets? Experts explain

item.dc:creator: Morgan Greenwald
Ashley Morris
item.description: Dermatologists share the best hyaluronic acid serums and creams to hydrate, plump and smooth your skin from brands like CeraVe and The Ordinary.

media:content.media:text: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: Woman holding serum bottle and taking out dropper
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: Side by side image of woman before and after applying hyaluronic acid serum.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: A hand holding a small pump of Ilia The Base Face Milk in beside the Ilia bottle on a windowsill.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

media:content.media:text: Close-up of Lancôme Genifique Ultimate Serum on a windowsill.
media:content.media:description: Hyaluronic acid is a great hydrator for all skin types, dermatologists say.

item.title: All the glow, none of the grease — the best hyaluronic acid products

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: With cyclosporiasis cases rising, washing lettuce and products is incredibly important. This salad spinner is over 30% off.

media:content.media:text: The Farberware salad spinner comes with a colander set inside of a plastic bowl to catch excess water.
media:content.media:description: The Farberware salad spinner comes with a colander set inside of a plastic bowl to catch excess water.

media:content.media:text: The Farberware salad spinner comes with a colander set inside of a plastic bowl to catch excess water.
media:content.media:description: The Farberware salad spinner comes with a colander set inside of a plastic bowl to catch excess water.

item.title: This Farberware salad spinner is more than 30% off, and perfect for washing lettuce and other produce

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: We’ve owned and tested more than 13 items from Calpak, including duffels and backpacks. Here are the best items to shop from the travel accessory retailer.

media:content.media:text: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.
media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

media:content.media:text: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.
media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

media:content.media:text: Woman sitting with Luka Padded Laptop Sleeve sitting next to her in the Luka Haven Tote.
media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

media:content.media:text: Woman wearing Calpak brown Water Bottle Holder outside.
media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

media:content.media:text: Woman sitting with the Haven Laptop Tote on her right side.
media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

media:content.media:text: Woman holding Calpak gym duffel with a rolled up yoga mat attached to it.
media:content.media:description: Calpak is a California-based travel accessory company that’s well-known for its comfortable yet stylish pieces.

item.title: The 13+ best items to shop from Calpak, tested and reviewed

item.dc:creator: Dennis Romero
item.description: A 26-year-old man was captured on video bolting across a two-lane Missouri bridge and diving headfirst into the waterway below at the end of a car chase.

media:content.media:text: A suspect jumped off a bridge while fleeing deputies in Missouri. He was eventually tracked down and taken into custody, according to authorities.
media:content.media:description: A suspect jumped off a bridge while fleeing deputies in Missouri. He was eventually tracked down and taken into custody, according to authorities.

item.title: Driver fleeing police dives headfirst off Missouri bridge in getaway attempt

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
item.description: The Trump administration is facing a spike in departures of powerful Cabinet department officials compared to his first term, according to the nonprofit Partnership for Public Service.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Meets With His Cabinet At The White House
media:content.media:description: New analysis from the Partnership for Public Service found that 27 Senate-confirmed officials have left their positions since the start of President Donald Trump's second term.

item.title: Departures of Senate-confirmed Trump officials are surpassing his first term, new report finds
